case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. EMANUEL LOGGINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED OCT-26-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGGINS, EMANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET, UNIT #214, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
